description.since2012: since January 2012. Proficient in designing and delivering scalable, resilient applications within the JavaScript ecosystem, working across both
description.architectures: architectures. Experienced throughout the entire development lifecycle, including planning, system design, development, testing, as well as monitoring and alerting.

sigmaMd.description: Increased client acquisition, driving a 25% growth in company revenue, by delivering and maintaining core billing features including invoicing, memberships, enrollments, and reporting on the SigmaMD platform using React and Node.js.

solides.description1: Improved developer experience and deployment efficiency by reducing release time from ~1 hour to under 5 minutes, enhancing the Node.js API and building a CLI with Commander.js to automate the single-spa deployment workflow, while maintaining the micro frontend architecture and orchestrator.
solides.description2: Improved performance and engineering standards across teams, driving consistent reductions in regressions, by leading 5+ internal workshops on micro frontend architecture and React optimization over 2 years.

bornlogic.description1: Built and scaled a reusable design system, improving overall website performance metrics by over 20% through codebase refactoring and component standardization with React, Storybook, lazy loading strategies, and memoization, while partnering with and mentoring the design team to drive adoption of the system.
bornlogic.description2: Led the development of new product features, establishing a strong code review culture that reduced production bugs and regressions by at least 10%, while driving consistent standards for performance, user experience, and accessibility across the team using React, JavaScript, and TypeScript.

eureca.description1: Designed and built the EuFest landing page from scratch, which attracted over 1,000 new subscribers for an online workshop series of Eureca using React, Tailwind and Gatsby for server-side generation.
eureca.description2: Improved user experience and scalability of the Eureca platform, reducing FCP and LCP by 20% creating the design system library with a strong focus on accessibility and performance using React, Design System, Storybook and Tailwind.

linx.description: Improved operational efficiency for kitchens serving 5,000+ employees daily by building and maintaining three fast-food applications with React, React Native and Electron.

unimestre.description1: Improved reliability and user experience for a product used by 500k+ students by delivering new features and fixing critical bugs across finance, academic, and library systems using PHP, jQuery, Delphi and MySQL.
unimestre.description2: Improved performance of academic reporting workflows, reducing MySQL query execution time by at least 40% by optimizing database functions and views through indexing strategies and query refactoring.
